bullets: Leading DevOps initiatives and cloud infrastructure automation
Implementing modern CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code practices
Built an automated platform with the Veeam for AWS API to standardise backup appliances across AWS environments
Introduced Bitbucket Pipelines to the DevOps team and created reusable OIDC Terraform modules for secure AWS access
Implemented Infrastructure as Code, replacing manual tasks with Terraform, Git, and GitHub Actions
Designed and deployed the 1Password SCIM bridge into ECS Fargate for seamless AD group management
Maintained multi-environment serverless government projects using Lambda & ECS Fargate, including CI/CD pipelines and CloudWatch monitoring
Migrated a Windows Server 2003 domain to a security-hardened AWS Windows Server 2016 environment with 20,000+ AD users
Redeployed internal tools from Windows Server to a Linux & SQL high-availability clustered environment
Provided 3rd line support for multiple sales channels of major global retailers
On-site installation and configuration of signage and interactive POS systems
Key part of the engineering team for a full football stadium WiFi installation
Provided critical support during worldwide sporting events
